title: sst-hgcc GPU kernel calibration table
description: Measured kernel times consumed by the Mercury GPU library via the platform parameter gpu_kernel_times (CUDA_PLAN.md §4.1). For each kernel, the model exact-matches the total thread count or log-log interpolates between samples (clamped at the ends), overriding the roofline estimate. A kernel absent from the table falls back to the roofline with a once-per-kernel warning.

version.description: Schema version. Only 1 is supported; the loader aborts otherwise.

kernels.description: Map from the kernel's Itanium-mangled name (the first argument of the emitted sst_hg_cuda_launch call) to its measured samples.

threads.description: Total launched threads = gridDim.{x,y,z} * blockDim.{x,y,z}. Must be > 0.

seconds.description: Measured wall-clock kernel time in seconds. Must be > 0.
